name: github_remove_user_copilot_space_collaborator
description: Remove a collaborator from a user Copilot Space (DELETE /users/{username}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/collaborators/{actor_type}/{actor_identifier}). Returns HTTP 204. See [Remove a collaborator from a Copilot Space for a user](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/collaborators?apiVersio
